title: Turtles Drop Scute
description: Makes Turtles drop Turtle Scute upon death. All mainstream mod loaders.
body:
**What this mod does**
Makes Turtles drop 1 Turtle Scute upon death.

This change makes turtles' loot system comparable to sheep. Killing a sheep grants 1 wool, but shearing it is more profitable.

You may also like:
- [Armadillos Drop Scute](https://modrinth.com/mod/armadillos-drop-scute)

**What this mod does not do**
Does not remove the normal methods of obtaining Turtle Scute.

This mod uses API features to ensure that its loot modifications are compatible with those of other mods, which is why it is not a datapack.
